name: rtx
_comment: RTX llama-server runs in router mode (--models-preset /models/preset.ini --models-max 1). Mix-precision: prefill uses 'mini' (Q3_K, ncmoe=2, 1187 pp t/s), decode uses 'balanced' (Q5_K, ncmoe=18, 50 tg/s). On every cold dispatch the coordinator POSTs /models/load to ensure the right preset is hot; llama-server returns success even if the model is already loaded.

name: p100
_comment: P100 llama-server runs in single-model mode (--model /mnt/readonly_data/...gguf), not router mode — /models/load returns 404. Leave prefill_model_name / decode_model_name / router_model_name UNSET so CoordinatorConfig.LoadWorkers and Router.PrefillModel/DecodeModel return null and the model_load call is skipped (Router.PrefillModel is gated by `if (m != null)` in WorkerSchedulerService.ModelLoadAsync).
